business.name: Thomas Lawn Care
business.tagline: Quality lawn care that shows up when we say we will

hero.headline: Wilmington lawns that *actually get done right*
hero.subheadline: We show up when promised, do exactly what we quoted, and charge what we said. Turns out that's rare around here.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From overgrown disasters to weekly maintenance
services_section.subheading: We handle whatever your yard needs — sod installation, cleanup, regular cuts, and everything between

services.title: Weekly Lawn Maintenance
services.description: Regular cuts, edging, and cleanup. Same crew, same day each week. No surprises on pricing or scheduling.

services.title: Sod Installation & Leveling
services.description: Complete ground prep, topsoil, and fresh sod installation. We make sure it's level and ready to grow.

services.title: Overgrown Yard Recovery
services.description: Turn impossible jungle back into a showcase lawn. We've tackled the worst and made them neighborhood standouts.

services.title: Same-Day Service
services.description: Need it done today? We often handle new customers the same day we quote — if we're in your neighborhood already.

about.heading: The lawn crew Wilmington actually recommends
about.body: Thomas Lawn Care has built its reputation one yard at a time across Wilmington. Our crew shows up when scheduled, charges exactly what we quote, and doesn't leave until the job's done right. It's simple: reliable service that neighbors trust and recommend to each other.

reviews.name: Christian B.
reviews.text: Kelsey was fantastic and really focused on what we needed. Great work at a fair price, and they always made sure mom's yard looked perfect. Communication was excellent all year.

reviews.name: Jon J.
reviews.text: They actually do everything that's impossible to find — show up on time, do what they promised, charge what they quoted. Super responsive too!

reviews.name: Andi S.
reviews.text: Saw Jeff working across the street and asked for a quote on the spot. Fair price and he did it that same day after finishing the neighbor's yard. Couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Bettie T.
reviews.text: Best lawn service ever! Turned our impossibly overgrown disaster into the showcase of the neighborhood. They go above and beyond every time.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Wilmington and surrounding communities
service_areas.subheading: Same reliable service throughout the Cape Fear region

cta.heading: Ready for a lawn crew that actually shows up?
cta.body: Get a straightforward quote with no surprises. Fair pricing, reliable scheduling, quality work — exactly what lawn care should be.
